query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND wikipediaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_wikipedia,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NULL OR wikipediaUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_wikipedia
FROM book_profiles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND wikipediaUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_wikipedia,
  SUM(CASE WHEN wikipediaUrl IS NULL OR wikipediaUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_wikipedia
FROM book_profiles;
